title: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CRISIS CENTER - 211info
text: MARION COUNTY MENTAL HEALTH PSYCHIATRIC CRISIS CENTER BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CRISIS CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Behavioral Health Crisis Center (BHCC) provides in-person crisis intervention. Services range from stabilization, mental health screening, hospitalization, respite and referrals for on-going case management, as well as short-term emergency prescriptions. At least one Qualified Mental Health Professional (QMHP) is on duty at all times to provide face-to-face assessments and crisis counseling. 1234 Commercial Street SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Adults experiencing a mental health crisis Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 585-4949 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Crisis Line (503) 585-4949 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for services. FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurances; no one will be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Marion County SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the grounds of Salem Hospital Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines In Person Crisis Intervention Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MARION COUNTY CRISIS LINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MARION COUNTY MENTAL HEALTH PSYCHIATRIC CRISIS CENTER
